editions.name: The Sea Blue Edition
editions.flavor_description: Red Bull Sea Blue Edition with the exotic taste of Juneberry
editions.alt_text: Red Bull Sea Blue Edition - image

editions.name: The Pink Edition Sugarfree
editions.flavor_description: The Pink Edition Sugarfree gives you Wings with the taste of Raspberry and exciting spicy notes of verbena

editions.name: The Red Edition
editions.flavor_description: The Red Edition with the fresh taste of Watermelon

editions.name: The Ice Edition Sugarfree
editions.flavor_description: The Ice Edition Sugarfree gives you Wings with the taste of Blueberry, Vanilla, and fresh notes of eucalyptus

editions.name: Energy Drink
editions.flavor_description: Red Bull Energy Drink is appreciated worldwide by top athletes, professionals, students and travelers

editions.name: The Blue Edition
editions.flavor_description: The fruity taste of Blueberry combined with the Wings of Red Bull makes the Blue Edition so special

editions.name: Energy Drink Sugarfree
editions.flavor_description: Wings without sugar. Red Bull Sugarfree is a Red Bull Energy Drink without sugar

editions.name: The Peach Edition
editions.flavor_description: The Red Bull Peach Edition with the taste of White Peach with a hint of citrus peel and floral notes

editions.name: The Summer Edition
editions.flavor_description: The Red Bull Summer Edition gives Wings with the unique taste of sudachi and lime

editions.name: The Cherry Edition
editions.flavor_description: Red Bull Cherry Edition with the taste of Cherry, with notes of almond and Cherry Blossom

editions.name: The Apricot Edition
editions.flavor_description: Discover the Red Bull Apricot Edition with the fruity taste of Apricot Strawberry
